verse.name: V1
verse.lines: When He rolls up His sleeves He ain't just putting on the ritz (Our God is an awesome God)

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: There's thunder in His footsteps And lightning in His fists (Our God is an awesome God)

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: And the Lord wasn't joking When He kicked'em out of Eden It wasn't for no reason That He shed His blood His return is very close And so you better be believing that Our God is an awesome God

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Our God is an awesome God He reigns from heaven above With wisdom, power, and love Our God is an awesome God

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: And when the sky was starless In the void of the night (Our God is an awesome God)

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: He spoke into the darkness And created the light (Our God is an awesome God)

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Judgement and wrath He poured out on Sodom Mercy and grace He gave us at the cross I hope that we have not Too quickly forgotten that Our God is an awesome God

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: Our God is an awesome God He reigns from heaven above With wisdom, power, and love Our God is an awesome God
